_comment: LEVEL CONTRACT — exhaustive reference for every supported field. All fields marked REQUIRED must be present. Fields marked OPTIONAL can be omitted; defaults are noted. Delete this _comment key from real levels.
_id: REQUIRED. Unique string. Use kebab-case. Campaign levels must start with 'campaign-'. Files must be named <id>.json
title: Campaign 01 · My Level
_title: REQUIRED. Shown in the level catalog and header.

initialState._comment: REQUIRED. Array of structures the player starts with.
initialState._id: REQUIRED. Short label shown on the board card. Used as variable name in the editor.
initialState._kind: REQUIRED. One of: stack | queue | list | doubly-linked-list | circular-list
initialState._values: REQUIRED. Array of primitives (number | string | boolean) or DataNode objects (see below). Stack top = last element.

properties._color: OPTIONAL. Hex color for the board card and block chip.
properties._nodeAutoTaint: OPTIONAL. If true, each node gets a distinct highlight color automatically.

initialState._comment: DataNode example — use when individual nodes need colors/highlight

goalState._comment: REQUIRED. Array of structures representing the winning state. Same shape as initialState.

constraints._comment: REQUIRED section. All sub-fields noted below.

operationPolicy._comment: REQUIRED. Every operation must be set to forbidden | permitted | required. 'required' means the player MUST use it at least once.

constraints._forbiddenBlocks: REQUIRED (can be empty array). Legacy per-kind block banning. Prefer blockLimits instead. Values are EditorBlockKind strings: value | var_binary_operation | conditional | while | for_each | break | function_definition | type_definition | return | var_declaration | var_assign | var_reference | var_operation

blockLimits._comment: OPTIONAL. Per-kind max block counts. Keys are BlockLimitKey strings. Omitted keys default to unlimited. Set to 0 to forbid, positive integer to cap.

constraints._maxSteps: REQUIRED. Max execution steps before the program is halted. Also used as fallback for maxBlocksGlobal if not set.
constraints._maxBlocksGlobal: OPTIONAL. Total blocks allowed across ALL routines combined. Shown in the block counter (X/N). Defaults to maxSteps. Set explicitly when you want a meaningful block cap independent of execution steps.

maxBlocksByRoutine._comment: OPTIONAL. Per-routine block cap. Key = routine ID from starterDocumentJson. Only active when allowAdditionalRoutines is false.

constraints._allowAdditionalRoutines: OPTIONAL. Default true. If false, player cannot add new routine tabs; maxBlocksByRoutine applies per-tab instead of maxBlocksGlobal.
constraints._maxRoutineCount: OPTIONAL. Default 8. Max number of routines (tabs) the player can create. Ignored if allowAdditionalRoutines is false.
constraints._minRoutineCount: OPTIONAL. Minimum routines required before Run is allowed.
constraints._requiresRoutineCall: OPTIONAL. If true, the main routine must call at least one other routine to pass.

structureCapacities._comment: OPTIONAL. Max number of values each structure can hold. Key = structure id.

constraints._noLargerOnSmaller: OPTIONAL. If enabled, forbids pushing/enqueueing a value larger than the current top/front of the target structure.
constraints._valueDomain: OPTIONAL. Restricts what literal values are valid globally.

structureConstraints._comment: OPTIONAL. Per-structure overrides for noLargerOnSmaller and valueDomain.

playLayout._comment: REQUIRED. Controls what panels the player sees and which opens first.
playLayout._panelOrder: Order of tabs shown. Values: board | steps | timeline
playLayout._initialPanel: Which panel is open on load. One of: board | steps | timeline

editorLayout._comment: REQUIRED. Controls the level-editor layout (used by professors creating levels, not students).
editorLayout._structureOrder: Order structures appear in the board panel.
editorLayout._panels: Each panel is one of: palette | canvas | inspector | preview | timeline

metadata._structuresUsed: REQUIRED. Array of structure kinds used. Values: stack | queue | list | doubly-linked-list | circular-list. Used for catalog filtering.
metadata._difficulty: REQUIRED. One of: easy | medium | hard
metadata.author: Core Team
metadata.description: Short one-sentence description shown in the catalog.
metadata._hidden: OPTIONAL (not in Zod schema, passes through). Set true to hide from campaign screen and next-level navigation without deleting the file.

tooling._comment: OPTIONAL section. Controls the student editor experience.
tooling._availableStructures: OPTIONAL. Which structure kinds the player can add via the board config. Defaults to all three: stack, queue, list.
tooling._advancedToolsEnabled: OPTIONAL. Default true. If false, hides advanced palette groups.
tooling._starterDocumentJson: OPTIONAL. JSON-encoded EditorDocument string. Pre-populates the editor with blocks. Use lockedBlockIds to prevent editing specific blocks. Routine IDs here must match keys in maxBlocksByRoutine if used.
tooling._lockedBlockIds: OPTIONAL. Array of statement IDs from starterDocumentJson that the student cannot move, delete, or modify.

teaching._comment: OPTIONAL section. Pop-up messages shown at key moments.
teaching._introduces: Array of concept strings shown in the level intro card.

messages.title: This level introduces the while loop
messages.body: A while loop repeats its body as long as the condition is true. Use IS_EMPTY to stop when the structure runs out of values.

messages.title: Check your loop condition
messages.body: If the loop runs too many or too few times, the condition is wrong.

messages.title: One action per iteration
messages.body: Each loop body run should do exactly one transfer. The loop handles repetition.
